# Chapter 11: Fluid dynamics: inviscid  (~110 pp)
- 11.1 Continuity equation (12) · 11.2 Momentum equation (Euler) (15) · 11.3 Bernoulli's equation (15) · 11.4 Streamlines, streaklines, pathlines (10) · 11.5 Vorticity and circulation (15) · 11.6 Potential flow (15) · 11.7 Worked examples: flow over an airfoil (inviscid), nozzle flow, dam spillway (15) · 11.8 Failure section: where Bernoulli does not apply, and why students misuse it (13)

**Archetype**: balance, transport. **Project**: build a Pitot tube; measure velocity in a household fan flow. **Exercises**: 35.
